rag_rules: Assume and guarantee statements must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
AGREE contracts are written within annex agree blocks in component types
generic_rules: Component type contracts should reference only visible features and not implementation-specific subcomponents
Guarantees must be expressed using visible inputs and outputs, not internal subcomponent paths
AGREE scalar types must be int, real, or bool; avoid package-qualified or invalid type names
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use const and eq declarations within the same annex to define visible constants and helper expressions
Ensure all identifiers in guarantees are either visible AADL features or previously declared in the same annex
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation annexes; they must reside in component type annexes
Avoid referencing subcomponent ports or implementation paths in component type contracts
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
